title: Spec Review
description: analysis/spec-reviews/[story-id].spec-review.json. Produced by the Spec Reviewer Agent (Phase 3 TG4) to ASSIST the human at Gate 3 — it never approves or rejects. Combines a checklist-driven findings list with deterministic risk-coverage (Improvement 3 / §4.5.a). auto_approval_eligible is only a hint; the human always decides (CLAUDE.md §3.5).

findings.description: Checklist issues the human should weigh at Gate 3. Empty array = the deterministic checks found nothing; it does NOT mean approved.

type.description: The checklist category this finding belongs to.

tc_id.description: Optional. The TC-XXX (or API-XXX) this finding concerns.

risk_id.description: Optional. The RISK-XXX this finding concerns.

severity.description: How strongly this should weigh on the Gate 3 decision.

recommendations.description: Free-text suggestions for the human / Planner (e.g. 'add a negative case for TC-003').

risk_coverage.description: One entry per RISK-XXX in context.json.risks[]. Deterministic from the RISK -> TC chain — no LLM (§4.5.a).

covering_test_case_ids.description: TCs whose risk_ids include this risk. May be empty.

uncovered_high_severity_count.description: Count of uncovered_risks whose severity is 'high'. When > 0, auto_approval_eligible MUST be false.

auto_approval_eligible.description: HINT ONLY — the human always decides Gate 3 (CLAUDE.md §3.5). Heuristic: true only when findings has no 'blocker', every high-severity risk is covered, and uncovered_high_severity_count == 0. Never auto-approves.
